ocr_findings.description: Callout box heading '試験にはコレが出る！' OCR-ed as '試験にはつしが出る！' — stylized katakana 'コレ' misread as hiragana 'つし'. Affects a recurring exam-tip heading throughout the chapter.

reviewer_notes: Content page explaining system configuration types (シンプレックス, デュプレックス, デュアル) with a 3-row table and two body paragraphs. Table structure well-preserved in OCR with all cell text accurate. The only error is the recurring stylized-font misread of 'コレ' as 'つし' in the exam-tip callout, a medium-severity wrong_char. Label 'content' is correct.
